description: Increments the message metric for a given key with a hard limit

conditions: cap is not None and counters[key] > cap
description: Ensures that the message metric does not exceed the specified cap

conditions: not cap is not None or not counters[key] > cap
description: No need to clamp the message metric as cap is not specified or metric is not greater than cap
Returns the value of the message metric for the given key
Initializes the counter for a given key if it does not exist
